summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Finance Tracker application completed successfully. Fixed critical recurring transactions timezone bug. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality fully operational with confirmed fix for Transactions page crash issue.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for accessibility

passed_tests: User registration with email validation and password hashing
User login with JWT token generation and authentication
Create multiple accounts with different types (checking, savings, credit, investment)
View all accounts with correct total balance calculation
Delete accounts and associated transactions
Create income transactions and verify balance increases
Create expense transactions and verify balance decreases
View all transactions sorted by date
Filter transactions by account
Delete transactions and verify balance reversal
Create recurring transactions with daily, weekly, monthly, yearly frequencies
Create recurring transactions with custom day intervals
Execute recurring transactions manually (FIXED timezone bug)
Dashboard displays correct total balance across all accounts
Dashboard shows correct monthly income and expenses
Dashboard displays net savings calculation
Dashboard bar chart shows income vs expenses by category
Dashboard pie chart shows expense breakdown
Dashboard shows recent transactions list
Generate PDF report for a specific month
Generate in-app report view with transaction details
Email report correctly fails without API key (expected behavior)
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Logout clears tokens and redirects to login
Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login
Mobile responsive design on smaller screens
PWA manifest and service worker are accessible
Transactions page loads without crashing (SelectItem fix confirmed)
